data TimeLocale = TimeLocale {
  • wDays :: [(String, String)]
  • months :: [(String, String)]
  • amPm :: (String, String)
  • dateTimeFmt :: String
  • dateFmt :: String
  • timeFmt :: String
  • time12Fmt :: String
  • knownTimeZones :: [TimeZone]
}
name: TimeLocale TimeLocale wDays months amPm dateTimeFmt dateFmt timeFmt time12Fmt knownTimeZones
